name: ExtensionSubscriptionStatus_Status
title: R5: requested | active | error | off | entered-in-error (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubscriptionStatus.status` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubscriptionStatus.status` 0..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SubscriptionStatus.status` 0..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubscriptionStatus.status` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionStatus` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionStatus.status` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: requested | active | error | off | entered-in-error (new)
element.comment:
Element `SubscriptionStatus.status` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionStatus` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionStatus.status` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: The status of the subscription, which marks the server state for managing the subscription.

binding.description: The status of a subscription at the time this notification was generated.
